Class MethodProfileStats

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Aggregated statistics for a single bridge method.

public sealed record MethodProfileStats : IEquatable<MethodProfileStats>
Inheritance
object
MethodProfileStats
Implements
IEquatable<MethodProfileStats>

Constructors

MethodProfileStats(string, string, long, long, double, long, long, double, long, long, long)

Aggregated statistics for a single bridge method.

public MethodProfileStats(string ServiceName, string MethodName, long CallCount, long ErrorCount, double ErrorRate, long MinLatencyMs, long MaxLatencyMs, double AvgLatencyMs, long P50LatencyMs, long P95LatencyMs, long P99LatencyMs)

Parameters

ServiceName string

The service name.

MethodName string

The method name.

CallCount long

Total number of completed calls (success + error).

ErrorCount long

Number of calls that ended in error.

ErrorRate double

Error count divided by call count (0–1).

MinLatencyMs long

Minimum observed latency in milliseconds.

MaxLatencyMs long

Maximum observed latency in milliseconds.

AvgLatencyMs double

Average latency in milliseconds.

P50LatencyMs long

50th percentile (median) latency in milliseconds.

P95LatencyMs long

95th percentile latency in milliseconds.

P99LatencyMs long

99th percentile latency in milliseconds.

Properties

AvgLatencyMs

Average latency in milliseconds.
